professional_identity.mission: I help Product and Engineering teams reduce technical uncertainty by transforming ambiguous system problems into evidence-based engineering decisions.
professional_identity.approach: Through deep technical investigation, bug reproduction and root cause analysis, I enable teams to resolve the right problem faster, de-risk product rollouts, and build confidence across Engineering, Product and Customer Operations.

professional_superpowers.name: Reduce Technical Uncertainty
professional_superpowers.description: Transforms ambiguous technical incidents into structured, evidence-based investigations that support better decisions.

professional_superpowers.name: De-risk Product Rollouts
professional_superpowers.description: Identifies and reproduces critical issues early so teams can scale product initiatives with greater confidence.

professional_superpowers.name: Build Cross-functional Trust
professional_superpowers.description: Creates confidence across technical and non-technical teams through clear analysis, calm communication and reliable follow-through.

decision_principles: Understand the problem before requesting urgency.
Respect Product and Engineering prioritization after a complete investigation.

avoid: High-volume ticket handling as the primary responsibility
Technical Support roles in B2C or B2B2C companies
Roles without meaningful collaboration with Product or Engineering
Work arrangements that significantly restrict remote work and travel flexibility

travel_flexibility.frequency: Ability to travel approximately every three to four months

roles.title: Technical Support Partner
roles.summary: Partnered closely with Product, Engineering and Customer Operations to investigate complex system incidents, reproduce bugs and reduce uncertainty before engineering implemented solutions.
core_responsibilities: Investigated complex technical incidents across multiple markets and system flows.
Reproduced production bugs and documented expected versus actual behavior.
Narrowed down probable root causes using product behavior, system data and technical evidence.
Collaborated with Product and Engineering during incident resolution, pilots and product rollouts.
Translated technical findings into clear guidance for Customer Support and other non-technical stakeholders.
Identified opportunities to improve processes and reduce recurring technical issues.
business_impact: Reduced the time Product and Engineering needed to understand ambiguous system problems.
Improved confidence in technical escalations by providing structured evidence before requesting prioritization.
Helped Customer Support teams respond to complex incidents with greater clarity and confidence.
Supported product pilots by identifying issues before broader rollout.

achievements.title: Supported the removal of a technical blocker preventing an international product rollout
achievements.business_problem: Reduce the risk of merchant fraud by preventing unauthorized financing after a customer had already left the store.
achievements.technical_challenge: The feature had already been developed, but a technical blocker prevented the rollout from expanding to multiple international markets.
my_contribution: Participated in the product hackathon focused on validating the feature for broader rollout.
Designed and executed functional testing scenarios.
Reproduced complex bugs and documented technical findings.
Used Claude to accelerate technical investigation and bug reproduction.
Collaborated with Product to identify and validate issues preventing rollout expansion.

business_outcome.summary: Contributed to the validation efforts that helped remove a blocker preventing the feature from expanding internationally.

estimated_business_impact.attribution: Estimated impact associated with the product initiative after rollout. Impact resulted from a cross-functional team effort.

public_notes: Contribution focused on testing, technical investigation and bug reproduction.
The feature already existed before the hackathon; the work focused on removing the blocker that prevented broader rollout.
Avoid mentioning confidential implementation details or non-public product information.
